prompt: Create a luxury real estate website with black and gold marble textures, 360-degree property tours, animated property cards, neighborhood heat maps, and elegant typography with shadow effects
prompt_refined: Generate a screenshot of a luxury real estate website. The design heavily features black and gold marble textures throughout its backgrounds and prominent UI elements. The central display area presents an interactive 360-degree property tour interface with a panoramic view. Below this, a grid of animated property cards is arranged, each showcasing a high-end property with a preview image and key details, with subtle visual cues indicating animation. A dedicated module, possibly in a sidebar or lower section, prominently displays a colorful neighborhood heat map. All website typography is elegant, with subtle shadow effects, rendered in gold or white against the dark marble.
objects: Black and gold marble textures (on backgrounds and UI elements)
Central 360-degree property tour interface with panoramic view
Grid of animated property cards (below central display)
Key property details text on cards
Colorful neighborhood heat map module (in sidebar or lower section)
